title: selinum razulii
intro: Selinum razulii, also known as the Mexican burnet or Mexican burnet sage, is a flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of northern Mexico and south-central United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selinum razulii include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues.
